properties.displayName: Azure Health Data Services workspace should disable public network access
properties.description: Disabling public network access ensures the Azure Health Data Services workspace (Microsoft.HealthcareApis/workspaces) is reachable only through a private endpoint. Microsoft's built-in policy only audits for an approved private endpoint connection; this definition denies on the publicNetworkAccess field directly for stronger enforcement. Child FHIR and DICOM services inherit the workspace connectivity unless overridden. See https://aka.ms/healthcareapisprivatelink.

metadata.description: Enable or disable the execution of the policy
